name: Pizza in a Crescent
recipeInstructions:
1 Press or roll each rectangle of dough to form a 7x5-inch rectangle on a cookie sheet.
2 Arrange pepperoni slices in the center third of each rectangle.
3 Layer 1 tablespoon spaghetti sauce and 1 slice cheese over the pepperoni.
4 Fold the short sides of dough almost to meet in the center, securely pinching edges together, leaving the middle open.
5 Tuck 4-5 pepperoni slices into the opening.
6 Bake at 375 degrees for 13-16 minutes or until golden brown.
